title: Glow emerges from stealth at $1.2B valuation to challenge endpoint security in the AI era | TechCrunch
summary: Tiger, a former Meta vice president of engineering, co-founded Glow alongside former Snowflake cybersecurity strategy head Omer Singer (pictured above, left), former Claroty vice president of research and development Ophir Arie (pictured above, right), and former Meta engineering leader Arnon Joseph.
